name: Amazon EFS FileSystem
description: Schema representing an Amazon Elastic File System, which provides a simple, serverless, set-and-forget elastic file system for use with AWS cloud services and on-premises resources.

FileSystemId.description: The ID of the file system, assigned by Amazon EFS.

FileSystemArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EFS file system.

CreationToken.description: The opaque string specified in the request to ensure idempotent creation.

OwnerId.description: The AWS account that created the file system.

CreationTime.description: The time that the file system was created, in seconds since epoch.

LifeCycleState.description: The lifecycle phase of the file system.

Name.description: You can add tags to a file system, including a Name tag. If the file system has a Name tag, Amazon EFS returns the value in this field.

NumberOfMountTargets.description: The current number of mount targets that the file system has.

SizeInBytes.description: The latest known metered size (in bytes) of data stored in the file system.

Value.description: The latest known metered size (in bytes) of data stored in the file system.

Timestamp.description: The time at which the size of data was determined.

ValueInIA.description: The latest known metered size (in bytes) of data stored in the Infrequent Access storage class.

ValueInStandard.description: The latest known metered size (in bytes) of data stored in the Standard storage class.

PerformanceMode.description: The performance mode of the file system.

Encrypted.description: A Boolean value that, if true, indicates that the file system is encrypted.

KmsKeyId.description: The ID of an AWS KMS key used to protect the encrypted file system.

ThroughputMode.description: Displays the file system's throughput mode.

ProvisionedThroughputInMibps.description: The amount of provisioned throughput, measured in MiB/s, for the file system.

AvailabilityZoneId.description: The unique and consistent identifier of the Availability Zone in which the file system is located.

AvailabilityZoneName.description: Describes the AWS Availability Zone in which the file system is located.

Tags.description: The tags associated with the file system.

Value.description: The value of the tag key.
